title: aster albescens var. albescens
intro: Aster albescens var. albescens, also known as White Wood Aster or Western American Aster, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Aster albescens var. albescens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
